original text:
▲Students shouting several slogans guarantee school's autonomy front Jogyesa Temple.
April General Student Council Student Council Jogye rally. rally objectives. Goals rally criticize Jogye Order Dongguk present conflicts related President Tae-sik (Bogwang) guarantee school's autonomy order.
A.M., people, about Donggukians people related Dongguk University, gathered together Manhae Hall. march began, marchers obstructed police officers because which prepared reported participate rally. Scuffles broke between police marchers. parade started Chungmu-ro where Dongguk University located, passed Myeong-dong finally Jogyesa Temple.
After several speeches students, gathered students tried deliver request proposal Jogye Order together, police officers blocked Therefore, allowed deliver request proposal persons concerned Jogye Order temple gate. request proposal involves following three demands: Jogye Order intervening school matters should guarantee school's autonomy, every sunim spoiled school needs apologize resign, board directors should reformed democratic
